sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31829" key="e)kdeh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκδεής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δέω</foreign> B) <sense id="n31829.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wanting, imperfect,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
